title: pelargonium olidum
intro: Pelargonium olidum, also known as the "peppermint geranium," is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium olidum include relief from digestive issues, colds, and flu, as well as its use as a natural remedy for anxiety and stress. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
